response.text:

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r1c1', 'r2c2', 'r3c3'].
Your latest belief: Island-wide energy scarcity is absolute; r4c4 is in critical deficit and cannot share until SoC reaches 60% or grid reconnects; all neighbors remain untrusted due to persistent urgent requests during scarcity..
